title: Kilometers and Kilometers
subTitle: A poor tour guide from Kerala takes an American client on a journey through India. During their travels, the changing landscapes and experiences help them reshape their understanding of each other.

title: Twenty One Grams
subTitle: A cop, Nandakishore, sets out to untangle a string of mysterious murders in Kochi. As the secrets unveil themselves, he finds himself in a dilemma.

title: Thelivu
subTitle: Gauri accidentally kills a wealthy businessman to stop him from molesting a little girl. When his minions chase after her and her husband, they must hide until the proof to exonerate them is found.

title: Meri Awas Suno
subTitle: After a radio jockey loses his voice due to excessive smoking, he walks on a difficult path to regain it by correcting his mistakes.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Loud Speaker
subTitle: An uneducated and noisy simpleton, Mike Philippose, arrives in a city as an organ donor for an old astrophysicist. Soon, he changes the lives of everyone around him.

title: Aadu 2
subTitle: Shaji Pappan and his team participate in a tug-of-war tournament to overcome their financial crisis. However, fate entangles them in a counterfeiting deal.

title: Neymar
subTitle: Kunjava and his mate welcome a tail-wagging friend called Neymar, only to find their lives thrown into complete disarray.

title: Aravindante Athidhikal
subTitle: After being forsaken by his mother in a temple, Aravindan, a five-year-old boy, is taken in by a hotelier. Against all odds, Aravindan clings to the hope of reuniting with his mother.

title: One
subTitle: An aspiring policeman embarks on an unauthorised mission to investigate a devious scientist. However, he confronts various challenges when his actions are exposed.

title: 12th Fail
subTitle: After a cheating attempt comes to light, Manoj Kumar Sharma, fails his tests. Years later, determined to become a police officer, Manoj attempts one of the most difficult exams in the country.

title: 12th Fail
subTitle: After a cheating attempt comes to light, Manoj Kumar Sharma, fails his tests. Years later, determined to become a police officer, Manoj attempts one of the most difficult exams in the country.

title: Trance
subTitle: Viju, a motivational speaker, is hired to be the face of a religious scam for which he undergoes rigorous training. As his popularity grows, he sinks into the depths of darkness and delusion.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Kaly
subTitle: Impersonating the rich, six youngsters break into a posh villa, only to find themselves trapped in a snare of their own making with a devious inspector hot on their heels.

title: Crazy Gopalan
subTitle: Gopalan, a notorious thief, teams up with Lakshmanan and continues to rob people. Their lives change when they kidnap a rich girl and find themselves trapped.

title: Teja Bhai and Family
subTitle: Teja Bhai, a gangster falls in love with Vedhika, a simple girl. He has to leave his criminal life behind in order to seek her father's consent to marry her.

title: Lucifer
subTitle: The demise of the leader of a political party leads to a massive power struggle. Amidst the chaos, a mystical man named Stephen comes in to ascend the throne.

title: Swapnakoodu
subTitle: Three men compete against each other to win the affections of a beautiful woman. However, complications arise when her mother suffers from a heart attack.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Cold Case
subTitle: An assistant police commissioner investigates a murder after a human skull is found inside a bag. However, things take a paranormal turn when the spirit of the deceased tries to reach out.

title: Cold Case
subTitle: An assistant police commissioner investigates a murder after a human skull is found inside a bag. However, things take a paranormal turn when the spirit of the deceased tries to reach out.

title: Innale Vare
subTitle: The life of a struggling actor changes when two individuals take advantage of him and try to dupe him. However, he strives to overcome his obstacles.

title: Heaven
subTitle: Peter Kurishinkal investigates a series of murders while silently grieving a personal loss, using both intuition and forensics to piece together the truth.

title: Ente Ummante Peru
subTitle: A youth's quest for his birth mother takes an unexpected turn when his late father's widow, Aisha, enters his life, altering his path.

title: Ponman
subTitle: Ajesh, a gold dealer, lends some gold jewelry for a village wedding, unaware of the betrayal ahead. However, the bride's husband plans to keep the gold and kill Ajesh.

title: Keshu Ee Veedinte Nadhan
subTitle: The life of an ordinary driver Keshu turns upside down when he wins a lottery worth 12 crores but his morality gets tested.

title: RDX
subTitle: Robert, Dony and Xavier grow up together while honing their fighting skills. However, after an incident separates them for several years, an attack on their family reunites the three friends.

title: Bro Daddy
subTitle: Two close friends, John and Kurian, wish to take their friendship one step further and get their children married. However, they are unaware of the lives their children lead in the city.

title: Bromance
subTitle: When Binto learns of his brother Shinto's disappearance, his search for Shinto leads him to collaborate with others, resulting in unforeseen turns, revelations, and memorable experiences.
